overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rural settlement with wooden shacks, then continuing along a winding dirt path through open grasslands during golden hour. The character passes a pig and NPCs in the settlement, then encounters a rider on a white horse in the prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural settlement with wooden shacks and farm animals

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement past wooden shacks and a pig

notable_agents.action: sitting on the porch of the wooden cabin
pig standing in the dirt near the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden shack with a porch and stairs
dark wooden structure with external staircase
metal water tower visible behind the right shack

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rural settlement with weathered wooden shacks. A pig stands in the dirt near the path, and an NPC sits on the porch of the left cabin. The ground is reddish dirt with sparse grass, and the sun casts long shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

events.description: leaving the settlement behind and entering open grassland with tall grass
sun becomes more prominent in the frame as the character turns westward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass toward distant mountains

entered.detail: white wooden house with dark roof situated on a small hill
mountain range visible on the horizon under the golden sky
rocky formation beside the path with sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the settlement and enters open grassland. A white farmhouse sits on a hill to the left, while the path winds through tall grass toward distant mountains. The sun is low in the sky, casting a warm golden light across the prairie.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland path with approaching horse rider

events.description: character slows slightly as horse rider approaches and passes by

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a horse rider approaches from ahead and passes

notable_agents.action: riding a white horse toward the camera character

entered.detail: large tree with dense green foliage beside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: As the character walks along the prairie path, a rider on a white horse approaches from the distance and passes by. A large tree stands beside the path on the right, and the distant mountains remain visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with winding dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding dirt path through the open grassland toward the distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the winding dirt path through the open grassland. The landscape stretches out with tall grass on both sides, and the mountains remain visible in the distance under the golden evening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rustic rural settlement into a vast, sun-drenched prairie. It begins by tracking the character through a cluster of weathered wooden shacks on reddish dirt, passing a pig and a resident resting on a porch under long, stretching shadows. As the character leaves the settlement, the scene opens into expansive grasslands where a white farmhouse sits atop a hill and the lighting shifts to a warm, golden glow. The camera then follows the winding path past a large tree as a rider on a white horse approaches and passes by, with distant mountains framing the horizon. Finally, the view expands across the open prairie, continuing along the dirt trail through tall grass under a clear evening sky.
